LanguageData.MLF_JumpOff.label: Attempting to jump off
LanguageData.MLF_JumpOff.beginLetter: {0} is having a mental break and is rushing to the edge to jump off!
LanguageData.MLF_JumpOff.recoveryMessage: {0} is no longer attempting to jump off.
LanguageData.MLF_JumpOff.baseInspectLine: Mental state: attempting to jump off
